feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Whats the Mac Shortcut key equivalent to CTRL+# in Windows (to comment out multiple lines)?
entry.content:
Dear all,

as already mentioned in the headline, I am looking for the Mac equivalent of "CTRL+#" to (un-)comment multiple lines in the SAC Coding. 

Thanks in advance,
Regards,
Chris

entry.title: SAC Data Action Advanced Formula - dynamic Average
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

in SAC, the data that is copied from actual to FC version should be extrapolated.

Example:

Actual were copied into FC version until February. The extrapolation was carried out from March to December, based on average of Actual.

The number of copied ACTUAL months is entered in the popup. The variable is used to calculate the average.

The following formula is used:

MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL"

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/StartDate] TO [d/Version].[p/EndDate]

VARIABLEMEMBER #DATE OF [d/Date]

//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

// Calculate Average of ActualValue

DATA([d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL",[d/Date] = #DATE) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "Z_S4_HSL") / %ZMM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL%

// Calculate FC Extrapolated

IF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 2 THEN

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(10, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(9, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(8, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(7, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(6, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(5, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(4, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(3, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(2, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 3 THEN

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(9, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(8, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(7, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(6, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(5, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(4, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(3, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(2, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

DATA ([d/Date] = PREVIOUS(1, "MONTH", [d/Version].[p/EndDate])) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 4 THEN

……..

The formula repeats until month 12 is reached

ELSEIF %ZM_ACT_PERIOD_UNTIL% + 1 = 12 THEN

DATA( [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/EndDate]) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Date] = #DATE)

ENDIF

Does anyone have any ideas on how the formula could be made simpler?

Thank You!

Marm

entry.title: SAC Objects backup
entry.content:
We are looking for the backup options for SAC inventory and found the below note.

We would like to know if SAP is taking the objects (Stories, Models, and  Connections) backup as part of the daily routine or Is it the Customer responsibility?

Also, what is the best practice to take the Objects backup?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Show Total feature not working
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

I have report which contains Monthly Actuals , Budget & variance , at the end i want to use Show total feature.

My columns( Actuals , budget are calculated ones  from  YTD data to Monthly data) and at end i want to put show Totals .(Attached screenshot)

My report is working dynamically based on month selection ( e.g. , if i select March , it will bring data till March ).

Issue 😆 At the end of March, I want to put 3 more columns in same report such as  Totals(Actuals), Total (Budget) & Total(Variance) till march. as you see my Report is dynamic based on Month Selection.

I tried using SAC features Show total , but its not working .

I tried using YTD figures at the end but it will keep on repeating from jan, feb & March .

Please help .

 

Thanks

Manoj

entry.title: how to get the selected filter member
entry.content:
Hi!
I need to read the selected element in a filtered hierarchy using SAC scripting.

Something like this:

  • All
    • (x) North
      • North-East
      • North-West
    • South
      • South-East
      • South-West


My script returns an array containing "All, North, North-East, North-West" using:

var sel_pcr = InputControl_1.getInputControlDataSource().getActiveSelectedMembers();

I only need "All, North" (might be on a different hierarchy layer!). Can anyone tell me how to determine the selected item?

 

Thx Stefan

entry.title: Change logic of a filter in SAC from "OR" to "AND"
entry.content:
Hi All, I was wondering if there is a way to change the logic within a single SAC filter. My current understanding is that by default the "OR" logic is applied to a single filter within SAC. My questions:

1. How can I change the logic from the current "OR" logic to "AND" logic?

2. Is it possible to give the end-user an option to choose between what logic they would like to use in that filter - "OR" or "AND"? How would I go about this?

Thanks very much for your support!

entry.title: SAC Planning Data Action & Allocation in a single step
entry.content:
Hi All,

In SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Planning, we have a requirement to transfer values (from one cost center to another) booked on the head office, in %'s that would be specified by the users.

In the below example, Head office has Rs 1,000/- expenditure, the user would mention 50% to be allocated to Warehouse & 20% to be allocated to Ecom team 

BEFORE Allocation

 

After he mentions the %'s, the expectation is that the values in the columns should look as seen below: -

AFTER Allocation

 

How can we achieve this in SAC using a Data action step (since the user is using the microsoft office SAC excel add in & hence we wouldnt want to use the distribute/redistribute feature present in the story).

 

@N1kh1l if you could please provide any inputs in achieving this.

 

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Add amount to legend in story report
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

In a tabel widget in Story Report is it possible to show both the percentage and the amount in the chart legend? 

 

Kind regards,

 

Monique

entry.title: How to export data from a chart in SAC via api?
entry.content: How to export data from a chart in SAC via api? What is the best practice

entry.title: How to hide "Loading Your Story"?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Is there a way to remove the "Loading Your Story" message that appears when opening a Story?

entry.title: Optimized Story Experience - GetResultSet after setfreshpaused(false) doesnt work anymore
entry.content:
Hi experts,

after converting my old classic analytic application to new Story OSE the following code doesnt work anymore.

Table_1.getDataSource().setRefreshPaused(false);
var membersRes = Table_1.getDataSource().getResultSet({"006EIDM3RWZJKVLQMDKLWU6MG":"39217857-8320-4345-9347-722179101763"});
console.log(memberRes);


var "memberRes" is now undefined. It seems the code now doesnt wait for the Table to be loaded. How can I fix that?

entry.title: SAC - TODAY() minus X is it possible?
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to build a data action which clears all the data in the model older than X days from the DATE dimension.

How can this period be defined within the MEMBERSET ?

I tried :

MEMBERSET [d/DATE_BACKUP] = PERIOD("2023-01-01") TO PERIOD(TODAY()-14)

Doesn't accept the syntax.

Will appreciate any advise,

Thanks

Yulia

entry.title: Optimized Story - Pages vs. TabStrip Widget
entry.content:
Hi experts,

in classic analytic applications I was using Tab Strip Widget to create "pages". When I convert my classic application to Optimized Story my Tabstrip with 10 Tabs is now in Page 1. Should I let it like this or should I create 10 pages and remove the Tabstrip Widget? Which way is recommended in case of performance or other SWOTs? Any suggestions or experiences?

thx

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Deleting Folder not possible
entry.content:
Hi friends,

We have an issue where we can't take ownership of a folder to delete it. The button is inactive for this particular folder. The owner column shows "-". It's quite mysterious. We've already tried with full privileges.

Any ideas on how to resolve this?

Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: Restricting a filter list with another filter - SAC analytics story
entry.content:
Hi, 

I have a dimension with a long list of members and a property. When I create an input control for the members, the entire list appears. I want to filter this list based on the property.

I considered adding a second input control to filter by the property. The combination of these filters is applied to the table, but the members list in the input control still shows all members.

Is there a way to code a dependency between these two input controls?

Thank you 

Deb

entry.title: Validation using a matrix table - SAC Analytics Story
entry.content:
Hello, 

I have two dimensions that need to be combined following specific validation rules. Unfortunately, I can't use the validation option on the model.

Instead, I'm using a matrix table where I mark authorized combinations with "1" and unauthorized ones with "0". I'm not sure if this is the best practice, so if you have a better approach, please let me know.

However, with this method, I don't know how to prevent data insertion in the unauthorized combinations. How can I achieve that?

Thanks.

entry.title: Designer is hanging in Excel Addin
entry.content:
Hi,

One of our users suddenly can not refresh tables in excel addin as the designer pane is hanging on sign in .

Image attached.

We tried to clear cache in Excel and optimize some settings --> Didn't help.

Anyone encounter this issue?

Thanks,

Yulia

entry.title: Dynamic Column Header in Table, using SAC + SAP DataSphere
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

 

Im currently trying to find a solution that would allow me to dynamically change the column header in SAC table (for example, via scripts). As a datasource im using SAP Datasphere.

I managed to accomplish similiar functionality some time ago using a CDS view with Dynamic Text Label, and then changing its value in SAC using scripts. But I can't find a similiar functionality to Dynamic Text Labels in SAP Datasphere.

I would welcome any ideas or feedback. My only workaround right now is to use a text label that covers the table but this solution cause massive formatting issues for me. 

 

Kind regards,

Chris

entry.title: SAP BO - e-invoicing implementation across EU member states
entry.content:
Dear SAPpers,

Following the introduction of e-invoicing in various European states, how is SAP moving to implement e-invoicing between member states? Is there anything in place already?

Thank you in advance for your support.

entry.title: Account input control in combination column & line chart
entry.content: I have made the following chart where is shown current budget, previous budget, forecast and actual. Accounts are restricted accounts. Customer has a requirement that user should be able to change the account in the table, but with restricted accounts it seems to be impossible. If I make the chart as bar or line, then I can use account input control so that user can change the account. Is this possible in Combination column & line chart?
